title: Vortexa Freight Weekly
summary:
Main
By Ioannis Papadimitriou
ANALYSIS / EAST OF SUEZ / DIRTY
Aframax DPP tonne-miles: Global by origin region (excl. Russia) vs ex-Russia
While DPP imports into China have equalled an all-time high in April , this has not been reflected on the shipping market. DPP Aframax freight rates for the Middle East-to-East Asia ( TD8 ) route have dropped by 20% m-o-m.

children.title: Aframax prevalence in the US Gulf could signal a drop in US exports
section_path: Aframax prevalence in the US Gulf could signal a drop in US exports
children.section_path_text: Aframax prevalence in the US Gulf could signal a drop in US exports
children.summary:
Crude tanker prompt ballasters to load in PADD 3 by vessel class
The share of European crude imports stemming from North America continues to climb according to preliminary data in May , almost reaching 40%. This ties in well with the fact that the US sustained record crude exports out of PADD 3 in April.
